transitions.name: initiate_scraping
transitions.start_state_description: The job is waiting for user input

criteria.name: input_provided
criteria.description: User has provided the URL and extraction parameters

process.name: start_scraping_process
process.description: Begins the scraping process based on user input

transitions.name: complete_scraping
transitions.start_state_description: The scraping process is currently in progress
transitions.end_state_description: The scraping process has been completed successfully

criteria.name: scraping_finished
criteria.description: The scraping task has finished execution

process.name: save_scraped_data
process.description: Stores the scraped data in the specified format

transitions.name: handle_scraping_error
transitions.description: Handle any errors that occur during scraping
transitions.start_state_description: The scraping process encountered an error
transitions.end_state_description: The error has been logged and the process is complete

criteria.name: error_occurred
criteria.description: An error occurred during the scraping process

process.name: log_error
process.description: Logs the error encountered during the scraping process

transitions.name: process_data
transitions.description: Process the scraped data for analysis
transitions.start_state_description: Raw scraped data has been received
transitions.end_state_description: The scraped data has been processed

criteria.name: data_ready_for_processing
criteria.description: Scraped data is ready to be processed

process.name: analyze_scraped_data
process.description: Analyzes the scraped data for insights
